description: A Commercial Construction project for a three-story office building is open in ProjectLibre. The project has experienced a foundation phase delay and requires schedule recovery. Set the project Status Date to February 15, 2000 and mark 'Cure piers and foundations' (row 42) as 100% complete. Reduce the duration of 'Strip column piers and foundation forms' (row 44) to 3 days to reflect an added crew, and set a 'Start No Earlier Than' constraint of March 1, 2000 on 'Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors' (row 48) due to a steel delivery delay. Insert a 0-day milestone named 'Foundation Remediation Inspection' immediately after 'Prepare and pour concrete floor in elevator pit' (row 46) with a Finish-to-Start predecessor link from that task, and assign the resource 'G.C. Project Management' to it. Set the project baseline to capture the recovery plan and save the project as /home/ga/Projects/output/schedule_recovery.xml.

duration_change_task.name: Strip column piers and foundation forms

constraint_task.name: Erect steel columns, beams and joist - 1st and 2nd floors

milestone.name: Foundation Remediation Inspection
milestone.predecessor_name: Prepare and pour concrete floor in elevator pit
